raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A wooden table holds a blue tray with a red apple, a white bowl with brown contents, a metal container, and a small orange. A burger patty is on the table near the orange. The burger patty is a flat, round object. STRATEGY - First, reach for the burger patty to grasp it. Then, transport it to the blue tray. Finally, place it on the tray. Failure modes include missing the patty during grasp or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the burger patty at its body for stable grasp. Step 2 grasp the patty at its body for secure hold. Step 3 transport the patty to the blue tray. Step 4 place the patty on the blue tray.
Goal: on(burger_patty, blue_tray)
Scene: burger_patty, blue_tray, orange, white_bowl, metal_container, red_apple
Step 1: reach(burger_patty)
  affordance_region: the body of the burger patty
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, burger_patty, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, burger_patty) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(burger_patty)
  affordance_region: the body of the burger patty
  contact: holding(burger_patty) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(burger_patty)
Step 3: transport(burger_patty -> blue_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue tray
  spatial: above(burger_patty, blue_tray, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(burger_patty)
  done_when: above(burger_patty, blue_tray, 0.05)
Step 4: place(burger_patty -> blue_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue tray
  contact: surface_contact(burger_patty, blue_tray) [completion]; released(burger_patty) [completion]
  pose: stable(burger_patty) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(burger_patty, blue_tray) AND released(burger_patty)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the burger patty
the body of the burger patty
an empty area on the blue tray
an empty area on the blue tray
